trigger: 因自己的偏执导致女主早产难产，以及面对女主递上和离书并平静表示“原谅”时，精神防线彻底崩溃。

appearance_delta.face: 面色惨白如纸，眼下乌青极重，眼眶猩红充血，满是错愕与恐惧
appearance_delta.body: 曾经挺拔的脊背弯折，显出极度的颓丧与无力感，甚至会踉跄跌跪
appearance_delta.hair: 发丝散乱，发冠微歪，失去了一贯的体面
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 通红的眼眶和因极度恐慌而颤抖的嘴唇

costume_override.outfit: 略显凌乱的常服，衣摆可能沾染灰尘，衣襟带有明显的褶皱

visual_reference: A handsome young ancient Chinese man in deep despair, pale and haggard face, heavy dark circles under red tearful amber eyes, messy hair with a slightly crooked hair crown, wearing a wrinkled dark grey robe, hunched posture showing deep breakdown and powerlessness, cinematic lighting, dramatic shadows, 8k.
emotional_tone: 极度恐惧、绝望、不可置信
